text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SEVERE WEATHER TILLAMOOK COUNTY TILLAMOOK WINTER SHELTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter when temperatures reach 35 degrees or below. Kennels for pets, water, snacks, and warm beverages will be provided. 2102 6th Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older, pets allowed Hours: Open 7 days a week 7pm-7am when temperatures reach 35 degrees or below Check in 7pm-10pm (503) 842-5261 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER TILLAMOOK COUNTY OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER
